title: gladiolus exalatus
intro: Gladiolus exalatus, also known as the sword lily or gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus exalatus include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
